name: Legendary Dragons Delta
description: A Dragon Frontiers deck featuring the Legendary trio: Latias ex δ, Latios ex δ, and Rayquaza ex δ. Uses Fellow Boost for energy acceleration, Link Wing for mobility, and Rage Aura for comeback potential.

cards.name: Latias ex δ
cards.role: Fellow Boost power for energy acceleration

cards.name: Latios ex δ
cards.role: Link Wing body for free Latias/Latios retreat

cards.name: Rayquaza ex δ
cards.role: Rage Aura body for comeback damage

notes: Tests Poke-Powers that end turns (Fellow Boost), prize-based body effects (Rage Aura), conditional attack damage (Special Circuit vs ex), and heavy energy discard attacks.
